languages.text: "Я прослежу за восстановлением обороны, назначу новых сержантов, а потом пойду по вашему следу. У руин вас нагоню".
"I'll see to the defences, appoint new sergeants, and then follow your trail. I'll catch up with you at the ruins."
languages.original_text: "Я прослежу за восстановлением обороны, назначу новых сержантов, а потом пойду по вашему следу. У руин вас нагоню".

traits.locale_text: "I'll see to the defences, appoint new sergeants, and then follow your trail. I'll catch up with you at the ruins."
"I'll see to the defences, appoint new sergeants, and then follow your trail. I'll catch up with you at the ruins."
"I'll see to the defences, appoint new sergeants, and then follow your trail. I'll catch up with you at the ruins."
"I'll see to the defences, appoint new sergeants, and then follow your trail. I'll catch up with you at the ruins."

languages.text: “我先去布置防线，委派新的军士，然后顺着您的路线追上去，在遗迹那里和您碰头。”
languages.original_text: "I'll see to the defences, appoint new sergeants, and then follow your trail. I'll catch up with you at the ruins."

traits.locale_text: “我先去布置防线，委派新的军士，然后顺着您的路线追上去，在遗迹那里和您碰头。”

languages.text: "Savunmalarla ilgileneceğim, yeni çavuşlar atayacağım ve sonra izinizi takip edeceğim. Harabelerde size yetişirim."
languages.original_text: "I'll see to the defences, appoint new sergeants, and then follow your trail. I'll catch up with you at the ruins."

traits.locale_text: "Savunmalarla ilgileneceğim, yeni çavuşlar atayacağım ve sonra izinizi takip edeceğim. Harabelerde size yetişirim."

languages.text: « Je vais inspecter les défenses et nommer de nouveaux sergents, puis je vous suivrai. Nous nous retrouverons aux ruines. »
languages.original_text: "I'll see to the defences, appoint new sergeants, and then follow your trail. I'll catch up with you at the ruins."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais inspecter les défenses et nommer de nouveaux sergents, puis je vous suivrai. Nous nous retrouverons aux ruines. »

languages.text: «Me encargaré de las defensas, nombraré nuevos sargentos y después seguiré su rastro. Me reuniré con usted en las ruinas».
languages.original_text: "I'll see to the defences, appoint new sergeants, and then follow your trail. I'll catch up with you at the ruins."

traits.locale_text: «Me encargaré de las defensas, nombraré nuevos sargentos y después seguiré su rastro. Me reuniré con usted en las ruinas».

languages.text: "Ich werde nach der Verteidigung sehen, neue Sergeants ernennen und Euch dann folgen. Wir sehen uns dann an den Ruinen."
languages.original_text: "I'll see to the defences, appoint new sergeants, and then follow your trail. I'll catch up with you at the ruins."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde nach der Verteidigung sehen, neue Sergeants ernennen und Euch dann folgen. Wir sehen uns dann an den Ruinen."

languages.text: 「防御は私が任せる。新任の曹長も任命する。そして、君の足跡を追う。遺跡で会おう。」
languages.original_text: "I'll see to the defences, appoint new sergeants, and then follow your trail. I'll catch up with you at the ruins."

traits.locale_text: 「防御は私が任せる。新任の曹長も任命する。そして、君の足跡を追う。遺跡で会おう。」
